basics.name: Josh Norman
basics.label: Senior Full Stack Developer
basics.summary: Senior backend-focused full stack developer building secure, data-driven systems for government and healthcare organizations. Experienced integrating LLM APIs into production systems and guiding engineers in practical AI-assisted development workflows. Strong in .NET platforms, relational databases, cloud infrastructure, and secure API design. Focused on developer productivity, CI/CD integration, and privacy-aware platforms handling sensitive data. Known for delivering practical, production-ready solutions that integrate modern AI capabilities into secure enterprise systems.

work.name: U.S. Department of Education
work.summary: Senior technical contributor and co-lead on a large-scale government data platform supporting compliance workflows.
highlights: Co-led backend and API development for a high-volume reporting system using C#, .NET, ASP.NET, Node, and SQL. Designed REST APIs with validation, auditing, and role-based access controls.
Modernized architecture to Angular 18 and RxJS, strengthening backend contracts and improving performance by 20%.
Integrated Databricks and Spark pipelines into reporting interfaces, improving processing efficiency and reducing costs by 15%.
Designed and optimized relational schemas supporting compliance-driven ingestion and reporting.
Collaborated with DevOps on secure Azure deployments implementing role-based access controls and configuration management.
Integrated LLM APIs into internal guidance systems, implementing role-based routing, structured prompts, and human escalation while mentoring engineers on AI-assisted development workflows.

work.name: Optum
work.summary: Backend-focused engineer supporting regulated healthcare data platforms, collaborating with data scientists and cloud teams to build secure systems.
highlights: Developed and enhanced backend services and APIs using Java, Spring, C#, and .NET, supporting high-volume healthcare workflows and internal reporting systems.
Migrated an acquired codebase into AWS infrastructure, building reusable GitHub Actions CI/CD pipelines adopted across teams.
Collaborated with data scientists to support Python analytics and ML workflows, ensuring secure processing in AWS and Databricks.
Optimized Databricks workloads and SQL solutions, reducing costs while maintaining performance and compliance.
Contributed to AI-enabled healthcare features including an LLM-assisted guidance chatbot, collaborating with data scientists and engineers to integrate AI safely into production workflows.

work.name: MediaRif
work.summary: Versatile developer and UI specialist delivering responsive, SEO-optimized web applications that enhanced user experience and organic reach. Adapted quickly across diverse technology stacks to meet varied client requirements.
highlights: Served as primary UI specialist on over 10 client projects, consistently delivering intuitive and engaging user interfaces using Angular, React, TypeScript, and JavaScript.
Achieved up to 40% improvement in organic traffic for client projects by implementing responsive design strategies and targeted SEO optimizations.
Developed and maintained robust CRUD applications, seamlessly integrating backend technologies including C#, .NET, ASP.NET, Java, Python, and Node.
Optimized SQL database designs and queries, significantly boosting application responsiveness and overall performance.
Adapted quickly across multiple technology stacks and frameworks, efficiently addressing diverse client needs and technical challenges.

education.summary: Active tutor, consistently made the Dean's List.
Graduated with a perfect academic record while providing tutoring for fellow students to help achieve their academic goals.

projects.name: AI Workflow Automation Consulting
projects.description: Advised an enterprise software executive on integrating AI assistants with operational systems using LLM connectors and workflow automation.
highlights: Designed AI-assisted workflows to summarize inbound emails, queue operational tasks, and generate recurring dashboards from connected systems.
Explored AI connectors and plugins to integrate APIs, enabling assistants to retrieve data and automate routine operational work.
Demonstrated how AI-assisted workflows can improve developer and operational productivity by automating repetitive tasks.

projects.name: Open Source Contributions to pandas_ta
projects.description: Contributed to pandas-ta, a financial technical analysis Python library, addressing critical issues and improving reliability.
highlights: Found issues with future leakage and implemented effective fixes to ensure data integrity.
Implemented NumPy 2 updates to modernize the codebase and improve compatibility.
Delivered incremental improvements on various features, optimizing overall performance and code efficiency.

projects.name: Androcula VSCode Theme
projects.description: Creator of a modern VSCode theme inspired by Andromeda and Dracula.
highlights: 5-star rated theme
2k+ downloads and climbing
